=== crawlers ===

crawlers are pieces of software that 'crawl' through websites using links and sometimes javascript code to find endpoints and other information about a page


Some crawlers that should be kept in mind are 

[[https://github.com/bhavsec/reconspider|ReconSpider]] is a simple crawler that has not been updated for a long time but is still useful


Burp Suite Spider TODO

OWASP ZAP TODO
